oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Introduction to bovine acupuncture
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Murphy, Anne
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: bovine acupuncture
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This paper introduces the use of acupuncture to treat pain and other conditions such as calving paralysis in cattle with a focus on the governing vessel and bladder meridians. Needle selec­tion, point location and identification are discussed.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 59-61
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
